title: Verilator produces bits of output that shouldn't exist

features.name: output port external write before eval
features.description: Code should include an output port that is written by external testbench code before calling eval()

features.name: 2-bit wire with overflow input values
features.description: Code should include a 2-bit wire port receiving overflow input values from external testbench (values exceeding bit width)
features.snippet: input wire[1:0] in1; // external code sets in1 = 5 (overflows 2 bits to value 1)
